title: Repeat P0 Run Planner Package v5.9
recommendedDecision: Use v5.9 as the private repeat P0 run planner after v5.8 acceptance. Build the run schedule, confirm attendance and quorum, execute only fake/sample scenarios, capture private evidence references, enforce stop triggers, retest provider refusal boundaries, and prepare post-run decisions. Do not approve limited private pilot, provider real-record access, outbound email, official Toastmasters workflows, public launch claims, or live Decidim from this planner.
plannerRule: Use v5.9 only after v5.8 acceptance review to build a private repeat P0 run plan; it schedules fake/sample retests, attendance, evidence capture, stop triggers, provider-boundary checks, and post-run decisions, but it is not pilot approval.
scheduleRule: A repeat P0 run cannot be scheduled while any P0 acceptance, authority, privacy, IDS/data, official-boundary, provider, launch-lock, evidence-capture, or export packet remains blocked or held.
evidenceRule: Every repeat scenario needs an owner, private evidence reference, redaction rule, stop trigger, public-safe line, and post-run decision gate before it can count as passed.
stopRule: The repeat P0 run must stop immediately if real participant data, official Toastmasters records, provider real-record access, cultural/sensitive material, live credentials, or an unapproved public claim enters the session.
launchBlockRule: Limited private pilot, provider real-record access, outbound email, official Toastmasters workflows, public launch claims, and live Decidim remain blocked until the v5.9 repeat P0 run is privately completed and passed after v5.8, v5.7, v5.6, and v5.5 acceptance gates pass.

scheduleBlocks.entryCondition: Authority chair and accepted alternate present with private authority minute.
scheduleBlocks.exitEvidence: Private quorum note and authority acceptance reference.
scheduleBlocks.stopTrigger: Stop if authority or quorum is unresolved.

scheduleBlocks.entryCondition: Privacy owner confirms consent, withdrawal, outbound-email, and evidence boundaries.
scheduleBlocks.exitEvidence: Privacy acceptance note and consent-boundary checklist.
scheduleBlocks.stopTrigger: Stop if real participant data or outbound contact enters the test.
scheduleBlocks.publicSafeLine: No real participant records are used.

scheduleBlocks.entryCondition: IDS/data owner confirms retention, export, deletion, and private storage rules.
scheduleBlocks.stopTrigger: Stop if evidence custody or data sovereignty is unresolved.

scheduleBlocks.entryCondition: Official route owner confirms no official member, officer, club, payment, education, or incident records are used.
scheduleBlocks.stopTrigger: Stop if official records or endorsement claims appear.
scheduleBlocks.publicSafeLine: Official Toastmasters workflows are not active.

scheduleBlocks.stopTrigger: Stop if real ABNs, revenue, client, contact, or private business records appear.
scheduleBlocks.publicSafeLine: Barayamal remains a controlled fake/sample organisation test.

scheduleBlocks.stopTrigger: Stop if official member records, payments, officer roles, club records, incidents, elections, or education records appear.
scheduleBlocks.publicSafeLine: First Nations Toastmasters remains an unofficial fake/sample tester.

scheduleBlocks.stopTrigger: Stop if wording implies launch, pilot approval, provider access, official workflow, or real records.
scheduleBlocks.publicSafeLine: Public status can say preparation only.

scheduleBlocks.runBlock: Provider refusal and RFQ boundary retest
scheduleBlocks.entryCondition: Provider access owner confirms refusal proof and safe alternative/RFQ boundary.
scheduleBlocks.exitEvidence: Provider boundary retest note and no-real-record line.
scheduleBlocks.stopTrigger: Stop if provider requests or receives real participant, organisation, or Toastmasters records.
scheduleBlocks.publicSafeLine: No provider has access to real participant, organisation, or Toastmasters records.

scheduleBlocks.entryCondition: Private evidence index, redaction rule, and export boundary accepted.
scheduleBlocks.stopTrigger: Stop if private evidence contents are exposed publicly.

scheduleBlocks.runBlock: Stop trigger and incident route drill
scheduleBlocks.entryCondition: Support, incident, withdrawal, and stop routes confirmed.
scheduleBlocks.exitEvidence: Incident drill minute and owner action note.
scheduleBlocks.stopTrigger: Stop if support route or escalation owner is missing.

scheduleBlocks.entryCondition: No live credentials, production access, or real data stores are active.
scheduleBlocks.exitEvidence: Technical dry-run log and rollback note.
scheduleBlocks.stopTrigger: Stop if live credentials or production systems are introduced.

scheduleBlocks.entryCondition: Every P0 scenario, evidence record, stop trigger, and public line has an owner decision.
scheduleBlocks.stopTrigger: Stop if any P0 result lacks owner signoff.
scheduleBlocks.publicSafeLine: Repeat P0 result is private until accepted.

scenarioDeck.testPrompt: Replay the authority acceptance path using fake records and private minute shell.
scenarioDeck.passEvidence: Authority owner confirms quorum and decision rights.
scenarioDeck.blockedData: Any real authority record or unresolved quorum.

scenarioDeck.testPrompt: Simulate a participant withdrawal using fake data and verify deletion/export boundaries.
scenarioDeck.passEvidence: Privacy owner accepts consent and withdrawal controls.
scenarioDeck.blockedData: Real participant details or outbound contact.
scenarioDeck.publicSafeLine: No real participant records are used.

scenarioDeck.testPrompt: Run fake evidence export and confirm redaction, retention, and private storage.
scenarioDeck.passEvidence: IDS/data owner accepts custody and redaction.

scenarioDeck.testPrompt: Confirm the test never touches official member, payment, education, officer, or club records.
scenarioDeck.blockedData: Official Toastmasters records or endorsement claims.
scenarioDeck.publicSafeLine: Official Toastmasters workflows are not active.

scenarioDeck.testPrompt: Create and support a fake founder/business-owner proposal.
scenarioDeck.passEvidence: Sample owner accepts the fake-data path.
scenarioDeck.blockedData: Real ABNs, revenue, contact, client, or business records.
scenarioDeck.publicSafeLine: Barayamal remains a controlled fake/sample organisation test.

scenarioDeck.testPrompt: Test moderation and evidence capture for a fake business-owner comment.
scenarioDeck.passEvidence: Moderation note and evidence reference captured.
scenarioDeck.blockedData: Real private business issues or cultural material.

scenarioDeck.testPrompt: Submit a fake guest inquiry and verify it stays outside official systems.
scenarioDeck.publicSafeLine: First Nations Toastmasters remains an unofficial fake/sample tester.

scenarioDeck.testPrompt: Test a fake member-boundary support action without official member identifiers.
scenarioDeck.blockedData: Official member numbers, payments, education records, officer roles, club records, incidents, or elections.
scenarioDeck.publicSafeLine: No official Toastmasters workflow is active.

scenarioDeck.testPrompt: Ask provider path to request records and verify the refusal/RFQ boundary holds.
scenarioDeck.passEvidence: Provider access owner accepts no-real-record proof.
scenarioDeck.blockedData: Provider access to real participant, organisation, or Toastmasters records.
scenarioDeck.publicSafeLine: No provider has access to real participant, organisation, or Toastmasters records.

scenarioDeck.testPrompt: Generate public line and check it does not imply launch, pilot approval, official workflow, or provider access.
scenarioDeck.publicSafeLine: Public status can say preparation only.

scenarioDeck.testPrompt: Capture fake evidence and produce a redacted export shell.
scenarioDeck.passEvidence: Evidence custodian accepts the redaction and export boundary.

scenarioDeck.testPrompt: Import fake offline/yarning-circle notes with consent and withdrawal markers.
scenarioDeck.passEvidence: Support owner accepts import and withdrawal route.
scenarioDeck.blockedData: Real names, cultural details, or sensitive stories.

scenarioDeck.testPrompt: Run the fake/sample flow on mobile width and low-bandwidth assumptions.
Confirm each P0 scenario has pass/hold/block status and a private owner decision.
scenarioDeck.blockedData: Any P0 result without owner signoff.
scenarioDeck.publicSafeLine: Repeat P0 result is private until accepted.

attendanceRoster.requiredFor: Consent, withdrawal, outbound contact, evidence disclosure

attendanceRoster.publicSafeLine: Official Toastmasters workflows are not active.
First Nations Toastmasters remains fake/sample only.
Dean/Barayamal review is advisory, not approval.

stopTriggers.immediateAction: Pause run, mark authority scenario blocked, and reschedule only after private authority minute.
Stop run, isolate record, delete/redact as approved, and record privacy incident route.
stopTriggers.publicSafeLine: No real participant records are used.

stopTriggers.immediateAction: Stop evidence export and return to custody acceptance.

stopTriggers.trigger: Official Toastmasters record or endorsement appears
stopTriggers.immediateAction: Stop run and remove official workflow from scope.
stopTriggers.publicSafeLine: Official Toastmasters workflows are not active.

stopTriggers.trigger: Provider asks for or receives real records
stopTriggers.immediateAction: Stop provider path and require refusal/RFQ boundary proof.
Stop run and escalate to private cultural/data authority.
stopTriggers.publicSafeLine: No cultural or sensitive material is in the public package.

stopTriggers.trigger: Live credential or production system appears
stopTriggers.immediateAction: Stop technical test and revoke/remove credential from the fake/sample environment.
Hold public line and replace with preparation-only wording.
stopTriggers.publicSafeLine: Public status can say preparation only.

stopTriggers.immediateAction: Stop participant-facing scenario until support and withdrawal route exists.

stopTriggers.trigger: Any P0 evidence lacks owner signoff
stopTriggers.immediateAction: Block final decision minute and return to owner acceptance.
stopTriggers.publicSafeLine: Repeat P0 result is private until accepted.

providerBoundaryTests.mustProve: Provider path refuses real participant, organisation, and Toastmasters records.
providerBoundaryTests.mustNotDo: Send real records to a provider.
providerBoundaryTests.publicSafeLine: No provider has access to real participant, organisation, or Toastmasters records.

providerBoundaryTests.mustProve: RFQ or quote path uses fake/sample requirements only.
Provider evidence packet contains only refusal proof and boundary notes.
providerBoundaryTests.mustNotDo: Publish provider correspondence with private details.
providerBoundaryTests.publicSafeLine: Private provider evidence is not published.

providerBoundaryTests.mustProve: No provider account, API key, production credential, or live environment access exists.
providerBoundaryTests.publicSafeLine: Live Decidim and provider access remain blocked.

providerBoundaryTests.mustProve: Public line says no provider has real-record access.
providerBoundaryTests.mustNotDo: Claim provider selection, launch, or access approval.

providerBoundaryTests.mustProve: Incident route exists if provider boundary fails.
providerBoundaryTests.mustNotDo: Continue after provider asks for real records.
providerBoundaryTests.publicSafeLine: Provider boundary failures stop the run.

providerBoundaryTests.mustProve: Provider owner accepts the repeat test result privately.
providerBoundaryTests.mustNotDo: Let advisory review replace provider-owner signoff.

providerBoundaryTests.mustProve: Final authority decision keeps provider real-record access blocked.
providerBoundaryTests.mustNotDo: Treat fake/sample provider retest as real provider approval.
providerBoundaryTests.publicSafeLine: Provider approval has not been granted.

sampleTrackTests.excludedData: Official member numbers, payments, officer roles, club records, incidents, elections, or education records.

sampleTrackTests.fakeInput: No education or payment data entered.

postRunDecisionGates.mustPass: SCN-001 to SCN-004, SCN-009 to SCN-011, and SCN-014 pass privately.
Authority chair signs private post-run decision minute.
Consent, withdrawal, evidence, and outbound-contact controls pass.
postRunDecisionGates.publicSafeLine: No real participant records are used.

postRunDecisionGates.mustPass: Custody, redaction, export, retention, and deletion controls pass.

postRunDecisionGates.publicSafeLine: Official Toastmasters workflows are not active.

postRunDecisionGates.mustPass: Barayamal and FN Toastmasters sample tracks pass with fake/sample data.
postRunDecisionGates.publicSafeLine: Controlled sample tests remain fake/sample only.

postRunDecisionGates.mustPass: Every public line says preparation only.
postRunDecisionGates.publicSafeLine: Public status can say preparation only.

postRunDecisionGates.mustPass: Private minute, evidence index, scenario result, stop-trigger log, and decision packet are complete.
Proceed to repeat remediation, no-go/archive, or prepare owner-only limited pilot decision after all P0 gates pass.

communicationsHolds.approvedLine: A private fake/sample repeat P0 run is being prepared.
communicationsHolds.blockedLine: The pilot is approved or live.

communicationsHolds.approvedLine: No provider has access to real participant, organisation, or Toastmasters records.
communicationsHolds.blockedLine: A provider has been approved for real records.

communicationsHolds.approvedLine: Barayamal is being used as a controlled fake/sample organisation test.
communicationsHolds.blockedLine: Barayamal participants or real businesses have been onboarded.

communicationsHolds.approvedLine: First Nations Toastmasters is being used as an unofficial fake/sample tester.
Private evidence is not published in the public demo.
No outbound email is active for real participants.
communicationsHolds.blockedLine: Emails have been sent to participants.

communicationsHolds.approvedLine: Any pilot decision remains private until owners accept the repeat P0 result.
communicationsHolds.blockedLine: A pilot decision has been made.

exportPackets.contains: Run schedule, attendance, selected scenarios, stop triggers, and decision gates.
exportPackets.excludes: Real records, credentials, official Toastmasters data.

exportPackets.contains: Scenario pass/hold/block outcomes and owner notes.
Evidence references, redaction rules, stop triggers, and public-safe lines.
PBT-001 to PBT-008 and ACC-008/HOF-008/EVS-008/OSP-008 chain.
exportPackets.excludes: Provider credentials, real datasets, or private provider correspondence.

exportPackets.contains: Barayamal and FN Toastmasters fake/sample results.
exportPackets.excludes: Real business or official member records.

exportPackets.contains: Triggered or armed stop rules and owner actions.
Approved preparation-only lines and blocked claims.
Final owner decision options and P0 pass/fail summary.
